ADPR.source_note: ADPR is a hash-only provenance log; it stores commitments only

AgentPACT.source_note: PACT records provenance, accountability, compatibility, and trust as a hash-chain layer

EndowFront.source_note: EndowFront engine: aggregate pledges, project corpus, judge sustainability/open access

GPOA.source_note: GPOA scores governance-phase incidents on a rule_density x SPOF_density matrix

MLX.source_note: MLX-style license metadata is validated by MethodBond's Attestra predicate gate

PnR.source_note: PnR classifies and scores non-response, delay, and avoidance evidence

QVeil.source_note: QVeil upgrades TLS traffic to PQC through Kubernetes annotation and sidecar policy

Qvidence.source_note: Qvidence protects bio evidence through PQC capsules, hash chains, and jurisdiction routing

RouteSentinel.source_note: RouteSentinel gene: planned route, actual route, deviation policy, rollback state

WattMesh.source_note: WattMesh supplies home energy negotiation / renewable availability to the SkyGrid route primitive

purpose: Optional normalized artifacts for live layered-corpus forward candidates
